calendar.matters:
Petition To Return Trust Property Wongfully Obtained
Off Calendar Jun-17-2024 Off Calendar

Petition To Return Trust Property Wongfully Obtained
Off Calendar Feb-05-2024 Continued To Jun-17-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Return Trust Property Wongfully Obtained
Off Calendar Mar-01-2023 Continued To Feb-05-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Paris Richard appeared by zoom for Penny Griffin (successor trustee).
Katherine Malone appeared by zoom for Carrey Terry (respondent).

The court stated that it reviewed the file and that it sees some significant areas on calendar in Contra Costa County. Both counsel agree to continuing this matter to 2024 to allow those matters to conclude. The Petition to Return Trust Property Wrongfully Obtained is continued to February 5, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.

Petition To Return Trust Property Wongfully Obtained
Off Calendar Nov-09-2022 Continued To Mar-01-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Paris Richard, via Zoom, for Penny Griffin, Petitioner; Katherine Malone, via Zoom, for Carey Terry, Objector; Matthew Colliss, via Zoom, for Catherine Terry, interested Party.

The court advises that the hearing this morning is primarily to discuss whether venue is proper in San Francisco. Mr. Paris offers advocacy that venue is proper as the trust is administered in San Francisco. The court confirms with Ms. Malone that she has no position regarding the venue issue and her client's main objective is to resolve the coin issue. Mr. Collis advises that he believes that the Contra Costa Family Court is the proper venue for this issue and reports of a pending hearing in that matter set for next week and suggests continuing this matter to a date after that hearing to allow for its resolution. Ms. Malone agrees with Mr. Colliss' position. The court advises that it will be continuing this matter and reminds counsel of its pro bono mediation program and advises counsel to file a petition for an order to mediation if they wish to participate.

The matter is continued to Mar-01-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Rice. Not Reported.

Petition To Return Trust Property Wongfully Obtained
